_comment: Test-infra-only change: fixes coverage-instrumentation timing flake in two scenario unit tests. Touches only test/ files, no scenes/scripts/assets/project.godot, so nothing player-visible changed and a recorded battle can't show it.
reason: Test-only change (#508): makes the scenario unit tests robust to coverage-instrumentation timing. No player-visible game behaviour changed, so a recorded battle can't show it.
